compressed_prompt: **Explain city vs. village in a rap to a kid, using all capitals at least 10x. Divide into 5 sections with *** separators.**
response:
# City vs. Village Rap 🎤

Yo little homie, let me break it down for you,
About two different places and the different things they do,
Listen up close cause the beat is gonna BANG,
Time to learn some knowledge with a little bit of slang!

***

In the CITY it's LOUD, there's buildings touching sky,
Skyscrapers and subways rushing people by,
MILLIONS of folks all living side by side,
Honking cars and busy streets, it's a WILD ride,
Restaurants and museums on every single block,
The CITY never sleeps, it goes around the clock!

***

Now the VILLAGE is quiet, with fields of green,
The PRETTIEST and most peaceful place you've ever seen,
Chickens in the yard and cows out in the grass,
Stars fill up the SKY like a looking glass,
Everybody KNOWS your name when you walk around,
A small and cozy, friendly little town!

***

The CITY has the traffic and the NOISE and the rush,
The village has the birdsong and the morning hush,
BIG stores versus farmers markets fresh and bright,
TALL buildings versus mountains reaching up at night,
Both places are SPECIAL in their very own way,
Just different kinds of AWESOME every single day!

***

So whether you love CITIES or a village life is cool,
Both places have good people, both places have a school,
The WORLD is full of differences and that is pretty great,
Every town and every city makes our planet FIRST RATE,
Now you know the difference, little homie, GO and grow,
DROP the mic and let the whole wide WORLD know! 🎤
